_meta.intent: TARGET-STATE schema — the source of truth to build TOWARD, not a mirror of the old file. Researched from the ClickUp 'URITP People FMP' doc, then edited: fields earn their place or get cut.
_meta.status: target-state draft, unverified against live file

conventions.keys: BARE style LOCKED (Michael 2026-07-18): PrimaryKey + fkPERSON/fkContact etc. This app does NOT use pk_/fk_ prefixes. Matches HML house style.
cutThisPass: broadClassification (now DERIVED from extension existence, not stored — W1)
derived: Student/Non-Student classification = which role extension a person holds (STUDENTS_ext / ADULTS_ext), not a stored flag
movedToSpokes: positions/titles/assignments → Labour (DG-005); People carries no position link, joins THROUGH Labour for a title at report time

tables.name: PEOPLE
tables.description: Canonical identity record, one per human. Lean target: names + display cascade + pronunciation + playbill credit + ClickUp merge handle + audit. Classification is derived from extension existence, not stored. No app-specific fields.

fields.name: preferredFirstName
fields.notes: working name; wins over true in displays. renamed from as-built typo prefferedFirstName

fields.name: alternateName
fields.notes: KEEP: foreign-exchange-student case — goes by a name distinct from legal/preferred. additive, feeds playbill

fields.name: useAlternateNameGlobally
fields.notes: toggles alternate override globally vs playbill-only

fields.name: NameDisplayInPlaybills
fields.notes: KEEP: hard-coded manual source of truth for what prints in a playbill; often not any combination of real/preferred/alternate

fields.name: autoFirstLast
fields.notes: 'First Last' working name (preferred if set, else true)

fields.name: customID
fields.notes: KEEP: CRM-### human-readable merge handle to ClickUp (with email). distinct from the machine-only UUID PK

tables.name: STUDENTS_ext
tables.description: Student role extension off PEOPLE (one-to-one via fkPERSON). Carries student-specific IDENTITY facts (student ID, class year) per the 'editable identity facts live in People' ruling. Enrollment history does NOT live here — it's a Courses spoke link. Existence of this record = Student classification context.

fields.name: studentID
fields.notes: editable identity fact per ruling: lives People-side, not Courses

tables.name: ADULTS_ext
tables.description: Non-student role extension off PEOPLE (one-to-one via fkPERSON). Carries only the broad adult classification (kind of non-student). Position/title/department are NOT here — they are Labour-owned assignment data (DG-005). Existence of this record = Non-Student classification context.

fields.name: AdultType
fields.notes: value list: Faculty, Staff, Adjunct, Guest Artist, Vendor, Volunteer. broad kind-of-non-student, NOT a job title (titles live in Labour)

tables.name: CONTACT_INFORMATION
tables.description: One record per person. Primary phone/email + parent of the child Emails / PhoneNumbers tables (multiple per person). Q4 ruling: keep the full tree. Cascade-delete of children REVERSED (W1) — deleting a person does not purge contact history.

fields.name: primaryEmail
fields.notes: lowercase; second ClickUp merge key with customID

tables.name: Emails
tables.description: Additional emails per person (one-to-many off CONTACT_INFORMATION via fkCONTACT).

tables.name: PhoneNumbers
tables.description: Additional phone numbers per person (one-to-many off CONTACT_INFORMATION via fkContact).

fields.name: fkContact
fields.notes: → CONTACT_INFORMATION.PrimaryKey (as-built casing differs from Emails.fkCONTACT — reconcile to one)

tables.name: GRADUATION_CLASSES
tables.description: Class-year value source referenced by STUDENTS_ext.fkGraduation_Year. Table (not value list) because entries can carry more than a display label.

fields.name: dropdownName
fields.notes: Senior, Junior, Sophomore, First Year, Recent Grad, Alumni
